creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
Alexander Langer wrote:

> Thus spake Maxim Sobolev (sobomax@FreeBSD.org):
>
> > > author updates .el file (some new features)
> > It would be nice of you will give short list of added features as well. It should
> > be done each time when distfile changes w/o version bump.
>
> Oh come on. That's a version update... We never do version logs into
> ports-updates-logs.
>
> Just call it a "update to version 1.8" log.

Well, why I don't see PORTVERSION increase in your patches?

-Maxim
